search_empty_subtitle: Type something to discover thousands of anime titles
sign_in_subtitle: Track your progress and sync your list across devices
error_subtitle: Please check your connection and try again
privacy_intro: OtakuHub is a third-party client for MyAnimeList. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring transparency about how your data is handled.
privacy_data_body: OtakuHub does not collect any personal data. All browsing and wishlist data is stored locally on your device. If you choose to sign in with MyAnimeList, your credentials are handled directly by MyAnimeList's official OAuth2 service.
privacy_third_party_body: This app uses the MyAnimeList API (api.myanimelist.net) to fetch anime data. All data displayed is owned by MyAnimeList Co., Ltd. Please refer to MyAnimeList's Privacy Policy for more information.
privacy_contact_body: For any privacy-related concerns, please contact us through the app store listing.
